changeSet.author: franklin
changeSet.comment: Align the existing event publication table with the PostgreSQL schema expected by Spring Modulith 2.0 while preserving timestamps previously stored without a zone as UTC.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE event_publication ALTER COLUMN publication_date TYPE TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE USING publication_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', ALTER COLUMN completion_date TYPE TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE USING completion_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', ALTER COLUMN last_resubmission_date TYPE TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE USING last_resubmission_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
CREATE INDEX event_publication_serialized_event_hash_idx ON event_publication USING hash (serialized_event);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE event_publication ALTER COLUMN publication_date TYPE TIMESTAMP USING publication_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', ALTER COLUMN completion_date TYPE TIMESTAMP USING completion_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', ALTER COLUMN last_resubmission_date TYPE TIMESTAMP USING last_resubmission_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
